# Cooper

> Premium Astro 6 Boilerplate for SaaS, Startups, and Developers.

## Summary

Cooper is a high-performance, SEO-optimized starter built with **Astro 6**, **Tailwind CSS 4**, and **React 19**. It is engineered for speed, accessibility, and exploration, providing a robust foundation for modern web applications with a focus on developer experience and zero-vulnerability security.

## Architecture

- **Framework**: Astro 6.1+ (Static Site Generation with SSR support)
- **Vite**: Powered by Vite 7 for lightning-fast builds
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4.2 (CSS-first configuration with high-performance engine)
- **Interactivity**: React 19 Islands (hydrated only when needed)
- **Content**: MDX (Docs, Blog, Changelog) with Mermaid diagram support
- **Search**: Custom multi-language search powered by **Fuse.js**
- **I18n**: Full internationalization support with **EN**, **FR**, **AR** (RTL), and **DE**

## Usage

To start a new project with this template, run:

```bash
npx create-astro@latest --template GladTek/Cooper
```

## Navigation

- [Home](/) - Modern landing page with "Bento Grid" sections and interactive auras.
- [Documentation](/docs) - Comprehensive technical guides and component documentation.
- [Components](/docs/components) - Catalog of premium UI components (Buttons, Cards, Bento, etc.).
- [Changelog](/changelog) - Version history with unique ID management for accessibility.
- [Blog](/blog) - Articles and tutorials with MDX and social sharing.
- [About](/about) - Company narrative and team showcase.
- [Contact](/contact) - Accessible contact form with global field validation.

## Features

- **Zero-JS by Default**: Static HTML first, progressive hydration for React islands.
- **Universal Search**: `Cmd+K` interface with multi-language indexing via Fuse.js.
- **Accessibility (A11y)**: WCAG 4.5 contrast compliance, semantic heading hierarchy, and ARIA-ready interactive elements.
- **RTL Support**: Native Right-To-Left support for Arabic (AR) and other RTL languages.
- **Theme Support**: Built-in Dark/Light mode with persistence and glassmorphism styling.
- **Sitemap & RSS**: Intelligent generation including `noindex` logic and localized feeds.
- **Deployment**: Integrated Cloudflare Workers deployment pipeline via `npm run deploy`.

## Configuration

Site-wide settings (name, description, features toggles, social links) are managed in `src/site.config.ts`.
Localization properties and translations are located in `src/i18n/locales/`.

## Security

- **Audit Status**: 0 vulnerabilities (Last audit: April 2026).
- **Updates**: Regularly synchronized with official Astro and Tailwind security patches.
